about.title: About XIMA
about.subtitle: Revolutionizing professional development through AI-powered assessments
about.mission_text: XIMA empowers professionals to discover their true potential and connect with the right mentors to accelerate their career growth.
about.vision_text: We envision a world where every professional has access to personalized guidance and mentorship, regardless of their background or location.
